app_release_notes: v1.2.11 - You can now remove the demo's sample rifle and barrel anytime (Settings, or Workbook menu > Remove Sample Data). The Measure screen shows what chronograph data a load already has ("5 charges - N555 - Jul 6"), so it's clear why results appear without importing. And re-planning a ladder on a load that already has chronograph data now warns you first, with a one-click Start a New Load.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.11 - You can now remove the demo's sample rifle and barrel anytime (Settings, or Workbook menu > Remove Sample Data). The Measure screen shows what chronograph data a load already has ("5 charges - N555 - Jul 6"), so it's clear why results appear without importing. And re-planning a ladder on a load that already has chronograph data now warns you first, with a one-click Start a New Load.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.6 - Compare Loads now shows every load you've saved across all your workbooks (grouped by rifle), and the Load Card prints the correct group, mean radius, and vertical SD for a powder-charge winner. Includes the 1.2.4/1.2.5 import fixes: Garmin xlsx import, target groups auto-pair by shot order, and cleaner staged-file handling.
